# 葉淨維 Ching-Wei (Matt) Ye

> PhD Candidate at National Taiwan University · Presentation Coach · Science Communicator

## About

Ching-Wei (Matt) Ye (葉淨維) is a PhD candidate in Occupational Science and Occupational Therapy at National Taiwan University, researching AI-assisted cognitive impairment diagnosis combining neuroimaging and machine learning.

He is also a presentation coach and science communicator with 150+ talks across 20+ organizations, specializing in helping researchers and professionals communicate complex ideas clearly.

ORCID: 0009-0001-6085-8303

## Pages

- Homepage: https://mattye.dev/
- Speeches: https://mattye.dev/speeches
- Coaching: https://mattye.dev/coaching
- Writing: https://mattye.dev/writing
